meta.title: Abstract & Academic Vocabulary
meta.description: Expand your academic vocabulary for discussing complex, abstract topics.
meta.description_ko: 복잡하고 추상적인 주제를 논의하기 위한 학술 어휘를 확장합니다.

explanation.en: A paradigm shift = a fundamental change in the basic concepts or thinking in a field.
explanation.ko: paradigm shift = 한 분야의 기본 개념이나 사고의 근본적인 변화.

choices: 패러다임 전환 — 기본 개념이나 방법론의 근본적인 변화

explanation.en: 'Profound implications' = deeply significant consequences.

questions.prompt: The study has _____ implications for our understanding of human cognition.

explanation.en: 'Ubiquitous' = seeming to be everywhere at the same time; extremely common.
explanation.ko: 'ubiquitous' = 어디에나 있는 것처럼 보이는; 매우 일반적인.

explanation.en: 'Gap between theory and practice' = the disconnect between academic concepts and real-world application.
explanation.ko: 'gap between theory and practice' = 학문적 개념과 실제 적용 사이의 불일치.

questions.prompt: The _____ between theory and practice remains a significant challenge in education.

explanation.en: High-frequency academic adjectives.
A dichotomy = a division between two opposite or contrasting things.
explanation.ko: dichotomy = 두 가지 반대되거나 대조적인 것 사이의 분리/이분법.

choices: 두 가지 반대되는 것 사이의 이분법

explanation.en: 'Proliferation' = rapid increase or spread of something.

questions.prompt: The _____ of AI in healthcare raises profound ethical questions.

explanation.en: 'Catalyst' (figurative) = something that causes or accelerates change or action.
'Shed light on' = clarify or illuminate something.
explanation.ko: 'shed light on' = 무언가를 명확히 하거나 조명하다.

questions.prompt: The research _____ light on previously unexplored aspects of the phenomenon.

explanation.en: 'Concomitant' = naturally accompanying or associated with something.
'Criticised for' = formally condemned for a shortcoming.

questions.prompt: The policy has been _____ for its failure to address long-term sustainability.

explanation.en: 'Nuanced' = showing careful attention to subtle differences; not oversimplified.
'Interrelated' = connected and interdependent.

questions.prompt: The two phenomena are _____ — they cannot be studied in isolation.

explanation.en: 'Ramifications' = complex consequences or effects.

questions.answer: The ramifications of this discovery are far-reaching and complex.

explanation.en: 'Exacerbate' = make a problem or situation worse.
'Reliability of the data' = how consistent and trustworthy the data is.
explanation.ko: 'reliability of the data' = 데이터가 얼마나 일관성 있고 신뢰할 수 있는지.

questions.prompt: The _____ of the data raises questions about the validity of the conclusions.

explanation.en: 'Hegemony' = leadership or dominance of one group over others.
explanation.ko: 'hegemony' = 한 집단의 다른 것들에 대한 지도력 또는 지배.

choices: 헤게모니 — 한 집단의 다른 것들에 대한 지배

explanation.en: 'Prevailing view' = the most widely accepted or common perspective.
explanation.ko: 'prevailing view' = 가장 널리 받아들여지거나 일반적인 관점.

questions.prompt: The _____ view holds that individual agency is constrained by social structures.

explanation.en: 'Insight into' (not 'to'): 'insight into the causes of poverty'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The study provides a comprehensive insight to the causes of poverty.'

explanation.en: 'Significance of the findings' = importance and meaning of what was discovered.
explanation.ko: 'significance of the findings' = 발견된 것의 중요성과 의미.

questions.prompt: The _____ of the findings cannot be ignored despite their controversial nature.

explanation.en: Dichotomous thinking = black-and-white thinking that ignores nuance and complexity.
explanation.ko: dichotomous thinking = 뉘앙스와 복잡성을 무시하는 흑백 논리.

explanation.en: 'Symbiotic' = mutually beneficial relationship.

questions.answer: The symbiotic relationship between the economy and environment is often understated.

explanation.en: 'Multifaceted' = having many different aspects or dimensions.

questions.prompt: The _____ nature of the problem means no single solution will be effective.

explanation.en: 'Mutually reinforcing' = each strengthens the other.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: How would you describe the relationship between the two variables? B: They are _____ — each one influences the other.'

explanation.en: Advanced academic verbs for research and argumentation.
explanation.ko: 연구와 논증을 위한 고급 학술 동사.
